name: Find Your Voice
description: Let's find your comfortable range. Just hum or sing naturally — there are no wrong answers here.

feedback.intro: Take a breath and sing the lowest note you can comfortably hold. Then we'll find your high end.
feedback.complete: Your comfortable range is {rangeLow} to {rangeHigh}. That's a solid starting point.
feedback.tip: Your range will naturally expand as you train. No need to push — comfort is the goal right now.
